sections.paragraph:
plur. עֲנָוִים (for which there is often in קרי עֲנִיִּים from עָנִי); const. עַנְוֵי (from the root עָנָה No. II., 2).-

(1) afflicted, miserable, Psa 9:13 10:12 , 17 Psa 10:17 22:27 34:3 147:6 149:4 commonly with the added notion of a lowly, pious, and modest mind, which prefers to bear injuries rather than return them; compare amongst other places, Psa 25:9 37:11 69:33 .

(2) meek, gentle, Num 12:3 (כתיב).
